title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery shares a technique for implementing persistent memory in AI agents. The video demonstrates how to enable agents to retain and recall information across interactions.
writeup: This video from JavaScript Mastery walks through a technique for giving AI agents persistent memory, demonstrating how an agent can retain and recall information across separate interactions. Persistent memory matters because it lets agents maintain context beyond a single session rather than starting fresh each time. The core takeaway is a practical approach to context management that connects stored information to an agent's ongoing behavior.
